title: Repository
description: A source code repository registered with Drone CI/CD.

scm.description: The SCM provider type (e.g. github, gitlab, bitbucket).

link.description: URL to the repository on the SCM provider.

private.description: Whether the repository is private on the SCM provider.

visibility.description: Drone visibility setting controlling who can view builds.

active.description: Whether the repository is active (has a webhook registered).

config_path.description: Path to the Drone configuration file within the repository.

trusted.description: Whether the repository is trusted (allows privileged containers).

protected.description: Whether the repository requires manual build approval for PRs from forks.

ignore_forks.description: Whether to ignore builds triggered from forked repositories.

ignore_pull_requests.description: Whether to ignore pull request events.

auto_cancel_pull_requests.description: Whether to auto-cancel pending PR builds when a new commit is pushed.

auto_cancel_pushes.description: Whether to auto-cancel pending push builds when a new commit is pushed.

auto_cancel_running.description: Whether to auto-cancel running builds when a new commit is pushed.

throttle.description: Maximum number of concurrent builds across the entire repository.

counter.description: The current build counter (used to set the next build number).

synced.description: Unix timestamp of the last repository sync from the SCM provider.

created.description: Unix timestamp when the repository was registered with Drone.

updated.description: Unix timestamp when the repository was last updated.
